rag_rules: Place assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when they reference component ports
Use valid AGREE syntax: assume/guarantee for contracts, eq for equations, const for constants, assign for bindings
Write output range guarantees using visible ports and concrete bounds
Avoid implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Use AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool) for declarations
generic_rules: Use concrete bounds or named constants in range assumptions and guarantees
Relate outputs to inputs in dependency guarantees
Avoid AADL property names in AGREE expressions unless exposed as ports or constants
Align helper declaration types with expression results
Use valid AGREE scalar types in declarations
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use eq for equations and const for constants
anti_patterns: Do not use subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not encode AADL properties as AGREE expressions
Do not use invalid AGREE scalar type names
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names are not AGREE variables
